strengths: 20+ years continuous software engineering across cloud infrastructure and emerging AI technologies, including current hands-on work on AI-agent frameworks and MCP code generation at re:cinq—significantly exceeds the 15-year requirement with demonstrated current relevance

Founder of GISCollective (10+ years) building an open-source geo-data platform adopted by real organizations like Green Map, demonstrating entrepreneurial mindset and proven ability to inspire adoption and community engagement

Multi-domain technical fluency spanning backend systems at scale (millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby), cloud infrastructure (AWS CDK), and emerging AI infrastructure—providing the strategic breadth needed to advise on implementation
concerns: No Master's degree or PhD in AI/ML field—missing the preferred advanced credential, though practical AI infrastructure experience is current and demonstrable

Portfolio emphasizes infrastructure, tooling, and platform building rather than shipped AI-powered products—limited portfolio evidence for 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products built with AI'
Career progression to Staff/Senior technical leadership but limited public visibility of director-level individual contributor strategic thought leadership or industry-recognized AI expertise

key_factors.factor: 20+ years engineering with current AI infrastructure immersion
Proven entrepreneurial platform-building and adoption track record
Limited demonstrated AI-powered products or industry recognition in AI

response.justification: Szabo exceeds the 15-year engineering minimum with 20 years of continuous technical work and brings immediate relevance through current hands-on engagement with AI-agent infrastructure and agentic frameworks at re:cinq. His decade-long track record building and shipping GISCollective—an adopted platform used by real organizations—demonstrates the entrepreneurial drive and ability to inspire others central to the role. While lacking an AI-specific Master's or PhD, his multi-domain expertise spanning backend systems at scale, cloud infrastructure, and emerging AI frameworks, combined with his proven platform-building capability, positions him to identify strategic differentiation opportunities and advise on cutting-edge adoption. His current immersion in AI infrastructure directly aligns with the role's focus on AI technology strategy.
